TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Hans-Adam II = Mntucing hngkawas 1945 idas 2 jiyax 14 ka Hans-Adam II ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Liechtenstein ta sayang o kiya ka Hans-Adam II, pnaah hngkawas 1989 idas 11 jiyax 13 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Hans Adam II Cinwang Bukung (Hans-Adam II, kana hangan: Johannes "Hans" Adam Ferdinand Aloys Josef Maria Marko d'Aviano Pius; hangan seyhu: Hans Adam II von and zu Liechtenstein, hangan hniwan: HSH The Prince of Liechtenstein, knkana hangan hnyuwan: splawa F√ľrst von und zu Liechtenstein, Duke von Troppau und J√§gerndorf, Count zu Rietberg, kngkawas 1945 idas 2 diyax 14Ôľć), Tukcka O Co qnlhangan Liechtenstein weynso, kiya ka laqi qbsuran Franz Joseph II (kngkawas 1906-1989) mi tuhuy qridin niya Georgiana Wilczek. Hans Adam II pa mntuting Switzerland Zurich, laqi cida daw wada phyuwan mpBukung, kiya ka Wangs sediq mpqlahang jaysang niya. Kngkawas 1984 idas 8 prading rmirih tama niya Josef II qmlahang qnlhangan. Kngkawas 1989 idas 11 diyax 13 cida wada mrdang ka Josef II, mntna diyax, Hans Adam II ka pusa kari rm irih mBukung, hangan pnsdhuwan ka Hans Adam II. Nasi ini spuwi ka Cyawcong pa, Hans Adam II ka Oco murux mndungus bay niqan biyax niya Cyuncu, kiya ka mnnniqan balay snbliqan dmuwi Cyuncu. Kngkawas 2003 muda mntxan kongto, muda psdhu ya muda pkrana biyax niya. Hans Adam II u muda psicu nasi ini pnlngu lnglungan niya ka ndanan daw, musa thdil nganguc Liechtenstein, kiya mi musa mniq Austria. Kiya u wada mdhu balay pkrana ka biyax niya Hans Adam II. Kngkawas 2012 quri so ya klihun ka biyax Cinwang na kongto pa wada hbaraw balay ka ini sruwa uri. Llaqi niya Ś≠źŚó£ Hans Adam II tuhuy Cinwanghuy qridin niya Marie Agla√ę, Countess Kinsky von Wchinitz und Tettau mniq kngkawas 1967 idas 7 diyax 30 wada msturung mi msdungus, niqan 4 laqi dha: ¬∑ Alois mpBukung, kngkawas 1968 idas 6 diyax 11 mntuting Switzerland Zurich, kngkawas 2004 cida alaw Hans Adam II iyux mpmalax Bukung mi mpSecng; qridin niya ka Pakriya na Sohuy kongcu (kngkawas 1967 idas 10 diyax 28 mntuting Doicu Munich) ddha dha u mniq kngkawas 1993 idas 7 diyax 3 mniq Vaduz msturung. ¬∑ Maximilian Nikolaus Maria Wangc, kngkawas 1969 idas 5 diyax 16 mntuting Switzerland St Gallen, qridin niya ka Angela Gisele Brown (kngkawas 1958 idas 2 diyax 3 mntuting Panama Bocas del Toro), ddha dha u mniq kngkawas 2000 idas 1 msturung. ¬∑ Constantin Ferdinand Maria Wangc, kngkawas 1972 idas 3 diyax 15 mntuting Switzerland St Gallen, qridin niya ka Marie Gabriele Franciska Countess K√°lnoky de K√∂r√∂spatak (kngkawas 1975 idas 7 diyax 16 mntuting Austria Graz), ddha dha u mniq kngkawas 1999 idas 7 msturung. ¬∑ Tatjana Nora Maria Kongcu, kngkawas 1973 idas 4 diyax 10 mntuting Switzerland St. Gallen, snaw niya ka Philipp von Lattorf, kngkawas 1968 idas 3 diyax 25 tntuting Austria Graz, ddha dha u mniq kngkawas 1999 idas 6 diyax 5 msturung.
S.PHON: = ńßans-adam ii = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka ńßans-adam ii ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin ta sajaŇč o kija ka ńßans-adam ii, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ńßans adam ii ¶inwaŇč bukuŇč (ńßans-adam ii, kana ńßaŇčan: …üońßann…ôs "ńßans" adam *…ô…ĺdinand alojs …üos…ô* ma…ĺia ma…ĺko d'a*iano pius; ńßaŇčan s…ôńßu: ńßans adam ii *on and *u li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin, ńßaŇčan ńßniwan: ńßsńß tńß…ô p…ĺin ¶…ô o* li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin, knkana ńßaŇčan ńßnjuwan: splawa **…ĺst *on und *u li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin, duk…ô *on t…ĺoppau und …ü*g…ô…ĺndo…ĺ*, ¶ount *u …ĺi…ôtb…ô…ĺg, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ***), tuk ¶ka o ¶o qnlńßaŇčan li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin w…ônso, kija ka laqi qbsu…ĺan *…ĺan* …üos…ôpńß ii (kŇčkawas ****-****) mi tuńßuj q…ĺidin nija g…ôo…ĺgiana wil ¶*…ôk. ńßans adam ii pa mntutiŇč swit*…ô…ĺland *u…ĺi ¶ńß, laqi ¶ida daw wada pńßjuwan mpbukuŇč, kija ka waŇčs s…ôdiq mpqlańßaŇč …üajsaŇč nija. kŇčkawas **** idas * p…ĺadiŇč …ĺmi…ĺińß tama nija …üos…ô* ii qmlańßaŇč qnlńßaŇčan. kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** ¶ida wada m…ĺdaŇč ka …üos…ô* ii, mntna dijax, ńßans adam ii ka pusa ka…ĺi …ĺm i…ĺińß mbukuŇč, ńßaŇčan pnsdńßuwan ka ńßans adam ii. nasi ini spuwi ka ¶jaw ¶oŇč pa, ńßans adam ii ka o ¶o mu…ĺux mnduŇčus baj niqan bijax nija ¶jun ¶u, kija ka mnnniqan balaj snbliqan dmuwi ¶jun ¶u. kŇčkawas **** muda mntxan koŇčto, muda psdńßu ja muda pk…ĺana bijax nija. ńßans adam ii u muda psi ¶u nasi ini pnlŇču lŇčluŇčan nija ka ndanan daw, musa tńßdil ŇčaŇču ¶ li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin, kija mi musa mniq aust…ĺia. kija u wada mdńßu balaj pk…ĺana ka bijax nija ńßans adam ii. kŇčkawas **** qu…ĺi so ja klińßun ka bijax ¶inwaŇč na koŇčto pa wada ńßba…ĺaw balaj ka ini s…ĺuwa u…ĺi. llaqi nija ** ńßans adam ii tuńßuj ¶inwaŇčńßuj q…ĺidin nija ma…ĺi…ô agla*, ¶ount…ôss kinskj *on w ¶ńßinit* und t…ôttau mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** wada mstu…ĺuŇč mi msduŇčus, niqan * laqi dńßa: * alois mpbukuŇč, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč swit*…ô…ĺland *u…ĺi ¶ńß, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida alaw ńßans adam ii ijux mpmalax bukuŇč mi mps…ô ¶Ňč; q…ĺidin nija ka pak…ĺija na sońßuj koŇč ¶u (kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** mntutiŇč doi ¶u muni ¶ńß) ddńßa dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * mniq *adu* mstu…ĺuŇč. * maximilian nikolaus ma…ĺia waŇč ¶, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč swit*…ô…ĺland st gall…ôn, q…ĺidin nija ka aŇč…ôla gis…ôl…ô b…ĺown (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * mntutiŇč panama bo ¶as d…ôl to…ĺo), ddńßa dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * mstu…ĺuŇč. * ¶onstantin *…ô…ĺdinand ma…ĺia waŇč ¶, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč swit*…ô…ĺland st gall…ôn, q…ĺidin nija ka ma…ĺi…ô gab…ĺi…ôl…ô *…ĺan ¶iska ¶ount…ôss k*lnokj d…ô k*…ĺ*spatak (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč aust…ĺia g…ĺa*), ddńßa dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * mstu…ĺuŇč. * tat…üana no…ĺa ma…ĺia koŇč ¶u, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč swit*…ô…ĺland st. gall…ôn, snaw nija ka pńßilipp *on latto…ĺ*, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** tntutiŇč aust…ĺia g…ĺa*, ddńßa dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * mstu…ĺuŇč.
S.FORM: = Hans-Adam II = Mntucing hngkawas 1945 idas 2 jiyax 14 ka Hans-Adam II ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Liechtenstein ta sayang o kiya ka Hans-Adam II, pnaah hngkawas 1989 idas 11 jiyax 13 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Hans Adam II Cinwang Bukung (Hans-Adam II, kana hangan: Johannes "Hans" Adam Ferdinand Aloys Josef Maria Marko d'Aviano Pius; hangan seyhu: Hans Adam II von and zu Liechtenstein, hangan hniwan: HSH The Prince of Liechtenstein, knkana hangan hnyuwan: splawa F√ľrst von und zu Liechtenstein, Duke von Troppau und J√§gerndorf, Count zu Rietberg, kngkawas 1945 idas 2 diyax 14Ôľć), Tukcka O Co qnlhangan Liechtenstein weynso, kiya ka laqi qbsuran Franz Joseph II (kngkawas 1906-1989) mi tuhuy qridin niya Georgiana Wilczek. Hans Adam II pa mntuting Switzerland Zurich, laqi cida daw wada phyuwan mpBukung, kiya ka Wangs sediq mpqlahang jaysang niya. Kngkawas 1984 idas 8 prading rmirih tama niya Josef II qmlahang qnlhangan. Kngkawas 1989 idas 11 diyax 13 cida wada mrdang ka Josef II, mntna diyax, Hans Adam II ka pusa kari rm irih mBukung, hangan pnsdhuwan ka Hans Adam II. Nasi ini spuwi ka Cyawcong pa, Hans Adam II ka Oco murux mndungus bay niqan biyax niya Cyuncu, kiya ka mnnniqan balay snbliqan dmuwi Cyuncu. Kngkawas 2003 muda mntxan kongto, muda psdhu ya muda pkrana biyax niya. Hans Adam II u muda psicu nasi ini pnlngu lnglungan niya ka ndanan daw, musa thdil nganguc Liechtenstein, kiya mi musa mniq Austria. Kiya u wada mdhu balay pkrana ka biyax niya Hans Adam II. Kngkawas 2012 quri so ya klihun ka biyax Cinwang na kongto pa wada hbaraw balay ka ini sruwa uri. Llaqi niya Ś≠źŚó£ Hans Adam II tuhuy Cinwanghuy qridin niya Marie Agla√ę, Countess Kinsky von Wchinitz und Tettau mniq kngkawas 1967 idas 7 diyax 30 wada msturung mi msdungus, niqan 4 laqi dha: ¬∑ Alois mpBukung, kngkawas 1968 idas 6 diyax 11 mntuting Switzerland Zurich, kngkawas 2004 cida alaw Hans Adam II iyux mpmalax Bukung mi mpSecng; qridin niya ka Pakriya na Sohuy kongcu (kngkawas 1967 idas 10 diyax 28 mntuting Doicu Munich) ddha dha u mniq kngkawas 1993 idas 7 diyax 3 mniq Vaduz msturung. ¬∑ Maximilian Nikolaus Maria Wangc, kngkawas 1969 idas 5 diyax 16 mntuting Switzerland St Gallen, qridin niya ka Angela Gisele Brown (kngkawas 1958 idas 2 diyax 3 mntuting Panama Bocas del Toro), ddha dha u mniq kngkawas 2000 idas 1 msturung. ¬∑ Constantin Ferdinand Maria Wangc, kngkawas 1972 idas 3 diyax 15 mntuting Switzerland St Gallen, qridin niya ka Marie Gabriele Franciska Countess K√°lnoky de K√∂r√∂spatak (kngkawas 1975 idas 7 diyax 16 mntuting Austria Graz), ddha dha u mniq kngkawas 1999 idas 7 msturung. ¬∑ Tatjana Nora Maria Kongcu, kngkawas 1973 idas 4 diyax 10 mntuting Switzerland St. Gallen, snaw niya ka Philipp von Lattorf, kngkawas 1968 idas 3 diyax 25 tntuting Austria Graz, ddha dha u mniq kngkawas 1999 idas 6 diyax 5 msturung.
S.PHON: = ńßans-adam ii = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka ńßans-adam ii ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin ta sajaŇč o kija ka ńßans-adam ii, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ńßans adam ii ¶inwaŇč bukuŇč (ńßans-adam ii, kana ńßaŇčan: …üońßann…ôs "ńßans" adam *…ô…ĺdinand alojs …üos…ô* ma…ĺia ma…ĺko d'a*iano pius; ńßaŇčan s…ôńßu: ńßans adam ii *on and *u li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin, ńßaŇčan ńßniwan: ńßsńß tńß…ô p…ĺin ¶…ô o* li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin, knkana ńßaŇčan ńßnjuwan: splawa **…ĺst *on und *u li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin, duk…ô *on t…ĺoppau und …ü*g…ô…ĺndo…ĺ*, ¶ount *u …ĺi…ôtb…ô…ĺg, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ***), tuk ¶ka o ¶o qnlńßaŇčan li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin w…ônso, kija ka laqi qbsu…ĺan *…ĺan* …üos…ôpńß ii (kŇčkawas ****-****) mi tuńßuj q…ĺidin nija g…ôo…ĺgiana wil ¶*…ôk. ńßans adam ii pa mntutiŇč swit*…ô…ĺland *u…ĺi ¶ńß, laqi ¶ida daw wada pńßjuwan mpbukuŇč, kija ka waŇčs s…ôdiq mpqlańßaŇč …üajsaŇč nija. kŇčkawas **** idas * p…ĺadiŇč …ĺmi…ĺińß tama nija …üos…ô* ii qmlańßaŇč qnlńßaŇčan. kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** ¶ida wada m…ĺdaŇč ka …üos…ô* ii, mntna dijax, ńßans adam ii ka pusa ka…ĺi …ĺm i…ĺińß mbukuŇč, ńßaŇčan pnsdńßuwan ka ńßans adam ii. nasi ini spuwi ka ¶jaw ¶oŇč pa, ńßans adam ii ka o ¶o mu…ĺux mnduŇčus baj niqan bijax nija ¶jun ¶u, kija ka mnnniqan balaj snbliqan dmuwi ¶jun ¶u. kŇčkawas **** muda mntxan koŇčto, muda psdńßu ja muda pk…ĺana bijax nija. ńßans adam ii u muda psi ¶u nasi ini pnlŇču lŇčluŇčan nija ka ndanan daw, musa tńßdil ŇčaŇču ¶ li…ô ¶ńßt…ônst…ôin, kija mi musa mniq aust…ĺia. kija u wada mdńßu balaj pk…ĺana ka bijax nija ńßans adam ii. kŇčkawas **** qu…ĺi so ja klińßun ka bijax ¶inwaŇč na koŇčto pa wada ńßba…ĺaw balaj ka ini s…ĺuwa u…ĺi. llaqi nija ** ńßans adam ii tuńßuj ¶inwaŇčńßuj q…ĺidin nija ma…ĺi…ô agla*, ¶ount…ôss kinskj *on w ¶ńßinit* und t…ôttau mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** wada mstu…ĺuŇč mi msduŇčus, niqan * laqi dńßa: * alois mpbukuŇč, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč swit*…ô…ĺland *u…ĺi ¶ńß, kŇčkawas **** ¶ida alaw ńßans adam ii ijux mpmalax bukuŇč mi mps…ô ¶Ňč; q…ĺidin nija ka pak…ĺija na sońßuj koŇč ¶u (kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** mntutiŇč doi ¶u muni ¶ńß) ddńßa dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * mniq *adu* mstu…ĺuŇč. * maximilian nikolaus ma…ĺia waŇč ¶, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč swit*…ô…ĺland st gall…ôn, q…ĺidin nija ka aŇč…ôla gis…ôl…ô b…ĺown (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * mntutiŇč panama bo ¶as d…ôl to…ĺo), ddńßa dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * mstu…ĺuŇč. * ¶onstantin *…ô…ĺdinand ma…ĺia waŇč ¶, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč swit*…ô…ĺland st gall…ôn, q…ĺidin nija ka ma…ĺi…ô gab…ĺi…ôl…ô *…ĺan ¶iska ¶ount…ôss k*lnokj d…ô k*…ĺ*spatak (kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč aust…ĺia g…ĺa*), ddńßa dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * mstu…ĺuŇč. * tat…üana no…ĺa ma…ĺia koŇč ¶u, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč swit*…ô…ĺland st. gall…ôn, snaw nija ka pńßilipp *on latto…ĺ*, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** tntutiŇč aust…ĺia g…ĺa*, ddńßa dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * mstu…ĺuŇč.
